title: Add Bee's Dance Show, Soak Kingdom Water Park (2040), and 1 AM Farewell Procession

requirements.text: Add 'Bee's Dance Show' as a new show attraction in Kid Grove themed land. The show should be added to the existing Kid Grove content without replacing any existing attractions. Include a description of the show featuring bees performing dance routines.

quotes: Make me a new show will be in kid grove show called Bees dance show
Be added as a new attraction

acceptanceCriteria: Bee's Dance Show appears in the Kid Grove themed land alongside existing attractions
Show has a clear description related to bees and dancing
Show is visible in the upcoming attractions timeline section

requirements.text: Add 'Soak Kingdom' water park scheduled to open in 2040. The water park should include exactly 4 water slides: one tornado slide and three additional slide types (such as body slides, tube slides, or speed slides). Include descriptions for each slide type and the overall water park attraction.

quotes: add in 2040 will be a water park called Soak kingdom add 4 slides a tornado slide and more
4 total slides including: tornado slide + 3 additional slide types

acceptanceCriteria: Soak Kingdom water park appears in the 2040 timeline section
Water park includes exactly 4 slides with distinct types
One slide is explicitly identified as a tornado slide
Each slide has a descriptive name and details

requirements.text: Add '1 AM Farewell Procession' as a special nightly event that occurs on select nights after the park closes at 1 AM. The procession should feature characters, floats, and other theatrical elements. Include details about which select nights it runs and what guests can expect to see during this late-night farewell event.

quotes: 1 am farewell procession after park closes
Nightly event after park closes on select nights, featuring characters, floats, etc.

acceptanceCriteria: 1 AM Farewell Procession appears as a special event in the shows or events section
Event is marked as occurring at 1 AM after park closing
Description includes characters, floats, and theatrical elements
Indicates it runs on select nights (not every night)

requirements.text: Display all three new additions (Bee's Dance Show, Soak Kingdom, and 1 AM Farewell Procession) in the appropriate frontend sections: Bee's Dance Show in the upcoming attractions timeline under Kid Grove, Soak Kingdom in the 2040 timeline section, and 1 AM Farewell Procession in the shows/events section with appropriate time and scheduling information.
acceptanceCriteria: Bee's Dance Show renders correctly in the Kid Grove section of upcoming attractions
Soak Kingdom renders correctly in the 2040 timeline section with all 4 slides visible
1 AM Farewell Procession renders correctly in shows/events section with time and schedule info
All three attractions maintain visual consistency with existing attraction cards

constraints: Do not modify or remove existing attractions in Kid Grove
Maintain the existing theme park timeline structure (2027-2040+)
Follow the existing content type patterns for shows, attractions, and events
Preserve the horror/haunt theme of the park while adding family-friendly water park content
nonGoals: Changing the park's operating hours or ticketing system
Adding any attractions beyond the three specified
Creating booking or reservation functionality for the new attractions

required: Cartoon-style illustration of bees performing a coordinated dance show on a stage with Kid Grove themed backdrop (bees-dance-show.dim_800x600.png)
Vibrant water park illustration showing a large tornado slide structure with swirling water effects and three other distinct slide types (soak-kingdom-waterpark.dim_1200x800.png)
Dramatic nighttime procession scene with illuminated character floats, performers, and theatrical lighting at 1 AM (farewell-procession-night.dim_1200x600.png)
